privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic Kubernetes cluster data generated by setup_task.sh containing 3 nodes (worker-us-east-1a, worker-us-east-1b, worker-us-east-1c) with 15 pods total. Pod distribution is 3 pods on Node A with 400m total CPU, 4 pods on Node B with 1250m total CPU (including payment-db-master with CrashLoopBackOff status), and 8 pods on Node C with 2400m total CPU. Users must create a diagram labeled cluster_state.drawio in ~/Diagrams/ directory and export it as cluster_state.png. All metadata values accurately reflect the data generation code.
